g.text: Event-level guardrails: no record leakage across event identifiers; event-equal aggregation; bootstrap over events, not rows.

text.style: font-size: 6.2px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #333333

g.text: Filter passage is necessary, not sufficient: false-unsafe burden and downstream decision cost remain.
